description: Composition Apple green round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, is sleeveless, has minimal chest print Fitting Slim Wash care Hand wash separately in cool water Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Make a statement with this puma Jamaica One Love t-shirt. Flaunt your biceps on the beach or at the gym or while you walk down the street. Feel at ease with the soft cotton and look great at the same time.
